name: Robin GigaPointe
comment:
Robin GigaPointe®: GigaPointe® - where cutting-edge innovation meets breathtaking visual brilliance. This versatile, IP65-rated lighting fixture is engineered for standout performance, delivering extraordinary output, dynamic high-contrast effects, and swift, pinpoint movement that instantly transforms any space into an unforgettable spectacle. Wherever your vision takes you, the GigaPointe® ensures show-stopping impact, anywhere, anytime! 

Powered by the advanced LSW-3™ engine and a white 350W Phosphor Laser source, the GigaPointe® produces a piercing, ultimate contrast incoherent beam with an intensity of >4.000.000 lx at 5 metres. Expect extreme projection quality and striking visual impact wherever it’s deployed.  
The 150mm front lens commands attention, while precision optics create flat-field beams, dynamic shapes, and stunning effects. GigaPointe® offers 1.8° - 21° beam and 3 - 42° spot modes, which automatically adjust based on selected effects. Beam reducers and both 1° and 5° frosts provide versatile options, from focused aerial beams to soft washes, enabling you to craft signature lighting statements.  
Colour is maximised with a CMY mixing system, a 13-colour dichroic wheel, and the DataSwatch virtual library - 66 pre-programmed colours, including essential whites, rich saturates, and refined pastels. Whether you need bold, dramatic hues or subtle, sophisticated shades, GigaPointe® offers a full spectrum of creative possibilities.
